findings.detail: Current pr-prepare and gate-dag artifacts were not bound to clean HEAD 1d898c835b65a48a16cb347f435584abb6265f63; they still reflected the pre-commit dirty HEAD.

summary: Implementation behavior reviewed cleanly. Story status/report/diagnose/HTML surface journey_context, missing vs machine-derived vs curated vs backend not_required behavior is represented, INV-SJD-1 through INV-SJD-5 are covered, and src/pr-manager.js is not modified. The review could not pass until PR Gate DAG/pr-prepare artifacts were regenerated for clean HEAD.
evidence: Diff against origin/main touches design-ssot.json, story/spec docs, src/story-manager.js, src/story-html.js, and test/vibepro-cli.test.js; src/pr-manager.js has no diff.
